events.title: Israel Strikes Hezbollah Targets in Beirut
events.desc: Israel conducted air strikes on the southern suburbs of Beirut, targeting Hezbollah infrastructure. This escalation occurred despite ongoing diplomatic efforts, with Iran insisting on the inclusion of a ceasefire in Lebanon within any peace deal with the United States.

events.title: Israel Launches Strikes on Southern Lebanon
events.desc: Following alleged Hezbollah drone fire, Israel warned of attacks and launched strikes in southern Lebanon, including near Nabatieh. This follows recent intensified fighting between Israel and Hezbollah, complicating broader US-Iran negotiations.

events.title: US-Iran Deal Framework Nears Completion Amid Conflicting Timelines
events.desc: The US and Iran are reportedly close to signing a framework agreement to end the ongoing conflict. While US officials and President Trump indicated a Sunday signing, Iran's Foreign Ministry cast doubt on the precise timing, stating an exact date has not been decided and emphasizing the need for caution due to the other side's hesitation.

events.title: US Strikes Oil Tanker, Killing Three Sailors
events.desc: The US military attacked a Palau-flagged oil tanker, accusing it of not complying with directions. The strike resulted in the deaths of three Indian sailors, highlighting ongoing maritime security concerns and potential collateral damage in regional conflicts.

events.title: Israeli Forces Kill Infant in Occupied West Bank
events.desc: Israeli troops killed a seven-month-old baby in the occupied West Bank. This incident adds to the ongoing tensions and violence in the region, with international bodies monitoring human rights violations.

events.title: Russian Shadow Fleet Tanker Seized by UK Forces
events.desc: UK forces boarded and seized the suspected Russian shadow fleet tanker Smyrtos in the English Channel during a six-hour operation. This action is part of broader efforts to enforce sanctions against Russia's maritime activities.

events.title: Israeli Strikes Hit Southern Lebanon, Killing 17
events.desc: Israeli airstrikes in southern Lebanon, specifically in the town of Tayr Debba, reportedly killed 17 people. This marks a significant escalation in the ongoing conflict, with reports of heavy casualties.

events.title: Russian Grain Smuggling Linked to Libya
events.desc: A new technique using AIS data has helped track the expansion of Russian grain smuggling, with evidence showing the bulk carrier Grumant stocking grain at occupied Feodosia before a long journey to Benghazi, Libya. This indicates a continued effort to circumvent sanctions.

events.title: Iran Demands Lebanon Inclusion in Peace Deal
events.desc: Iran has insisted that Lebanon must be included in any peace deal with the United States, complicating ongoing negotiations. This demand comes amid intensified fighting between Israel and Hezbollah.

events.title: Israeli Air Strikes Hit Tyre Amid Iranian Warnings
events.desc: Israel conducted air strikes on the Lebanese city of Tyre, despite warnings from Iran to cease attacks on its ally Hezbollah. This defiance signals a potential hardening of stances amid the ongoing conflict.

events.title: Iranian Police Infrastructure Targeted
events.desc: Efforts to 'make Iran ungovernable' have led to the damage or destruction of at least 80 police stations and Basij paramilitary infrastructure. Experts suggest this is a concerted strategy by the US and Israel to degrade the regime's repressive capacity.

events.title: Lebanese Armed Forces Struggle to Disarm Hezbollah
events.desc: The Lebanese Armed Forces are making slow progress in disarming Hezbollah, partly due to fears of internal splintering. This internal weakness complicates efforts to negotiate with Israel and strengthens Hezbollah's position.
